Hero.eyebrow: Platform + Agency. All in one subscription.
Hero.title: Your business organised, growing, and with someone watching over it.
Hero.description: Stubborn combines a complete AI-powered platform with the services of a marketing agency. In plans that grow with you, from basic to all-inclusive.

Services.heading: Bespoke digital experiences for brands that want to grow with consistency.
Services.subheading: We build and evolve digital solutions continuously, combining design, development and support to keep up with your company's growth.
Services.card1Desc: Original, functional layouts centred on the user experience. We create bespoke interfaces that translate your brand into design and deliver real results.
Services.card2Desc: Fast, responsive and scalable websites and web apps. We handle the technical side so your idea takes shape with performance, security and robustness.
Services.card3Desc: Updates, fixes, continuous improvements. We ensure everything always works well — with agile support and attention to detail.

Work.heading: More than projects — living assets. Built to evolve with each business.
Work.subheading: Our delivery is never an end, but always a beginning. We believe in solutions that grow alongside your company — every delivery is part of your digital function.

Blog.title: From our blog
Blog.description: Articles, guides and strategies to grow smarter.

Meta.title: Stubborn — Stop managing your business on WhatsApp and spreadsheets
Meta.description: Stubborn organises your sales, gets your website live, and monitors your business every month. CRM and AI platform + marketing agency in a single subscription. From R$ 500/month.
